checklist.title: Can gossip validation produce non-deterministic outcomes for the same sidecar input?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Trace all execution paths through the gossip validation pipeline. 2. Verify deterministic path selection from q_init to q_final. 3. Check for sources of non-determinism (race conditions, mutable state, time-dependent checks, RNG usage, floating-point precision). 4. Construct adversarial sidecars to trigger divergent outcomes. 5. Review validation caching for consistency.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001: Is the deduplication key (slot, proposer_index, sidecar.index) correctly enforced at the P2P gossip boundary?
Does the gossip network actor correctly reject duplicate data column sidecars before forwarding?
Does the beacon node correctly maintain data availability consistency when receiving duplicate sidecar tuples?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-002: Is max_blobs_per_block correctly derived from the epoch-dependent get_blob_parameters at block validation?
Verify Block Proposer Cannot Exploit Epoch-Dependent Blob Limits
Verify Beacon Node Epoch Derivation from Current State
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-002: Are blocks with zero blob KZG commitments correctly accepted as valid?
Verify Block Proposer Handling: Does the block proposer correctly create blocks with zero blob commitments?
Verify Beacon Node Validation: Does the beacon node permit zero blob KZG commitments without enforcing a minimum?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Are DataColumnSidecarsByRange response sizes properly bounded?
Verify RPC Requester Input Validation for DataColumnSidecarsByRange
Verify Beacon Node Response Construction Enforces Dual Limit
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Is DataColumnSidecarsByRange response ordering deterministic?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Does DataColumnSidecarsByRange include ALL sidecars from a block when any is included?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Are DataColumnSidecarsByRange responses from the canonical fork choice chain?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Is data_column_serve_range correctly enforced?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Does DataColumnSidecarsByRoot reject requests exceeding MAX_REQUEST_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Does DataColumnSidecarsByRoot only serve sidecars for validated blocks?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-004: Are blobs from engine_getBlobsV2 correctly handled with trust assumption?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-005: Does the node enforce subscription checks before publishing data column sidecars?
Can the anti-equivocation cache update be bypassed when sidecar publishing is skipped?
Can imported data columns bypass gossip validation rules?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-009: Does BlobSidecarsByRange correctly handle deprecation?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-009: Is BlobSidecarsByRange epoch range correctly enforced during Fulu transition?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-009: Are peers NOT penalized for transition-period blob requests?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-006: Is ENR eth2 value correctly encoded as exactly 16 bytes?
Can ENR no-fork invariant be violated?
Can ENR epoch be manipulated to reflect sync state instead of wall-clock time?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001/tb-002: Can a malicious peer forge a data column sidecar with a valid BLS proposer signature?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001: Is three-layer integrity verification enforced for all sidecars?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001: Is gossip validation ordered from cheapest to most expensive?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001: Can a non-proposer node get a sidecar accepted by claiming proposer identity?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001: Does p256verify handle all invalid inputs without reverting?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001/tb-003: Is p256verify input validation performed in exact sequential order?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Is the point-at-infinity check on R' enforced in p256verify?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Does p256verify use modular reduction for signature comparison?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001/tb-003: Is GAS_CAP enforced at both txpool and block validation?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Does block validation check ALL transaction gas limits?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001/tb-003: Is the gas cap value identical at txpool and block validation?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001/tb-003: Does gas cap apply uniformly to ALL transaction types?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-005/tb-006: Is ModExp gas cost deterministic across all clients?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-005/tb-006: Does multiplication_complexity have minimum output of 16?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-005/tb-006: Is ModExp gas floor 500 and /3 divisor removed?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-006: Are 256-bit integers used for ModExp gas calculations?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-016: Does parse_deposit_requests enforce two-layer deposit event filtering?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-016: Does extract_deposit_data validate 576-byte length and offsets?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-017: Is compute_requests_hash deterministic across all clients?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-019: Is EIP-7702 Authorization validation complete?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-020: Does encode_account produce deterministic canonical RLP?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is the GAS_CAP constant validated as exactly 16777216 (2^24)?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-001: Does the txpool reject transactions with gasLimit > 16777216?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-002: Does P2P-relayed transaction gasLimit validation match local submission validation?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Is the transaction gasLimit cap (16777216) enforced at block validation?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003/tb-005: Does block validation iterate over ALL transactions for gas cap check?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-003: Does block validation atomically reject blocks with any over-cap transaction?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is per-transaction gas cap independent of block gas limit?
Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is the gas cap (16777216) independently enforced at BOTH txpool AND block validation?
